problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Stem. Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
